title: Junior Revenue Manager at Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions
company: Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions:
Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions!
